2026-04-21T05:53:19.6459268Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T05:53:19.6460262Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-21T05:53:19.6461133Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
